title: Environmental Change and the Human Condition
summary: This presentation was given at the 1864th Stated Meeting, held at the House of the Academy on November 13, 2002.
body: This presentation was given at the 1864th Stated Meeting, held at the House of the Academy on November 13, 2002. To view full text please see PDF below (login may be required).
